semantic.role: Defines the ArchSpine package as an executable CLI tool for architectural governance and semantic analysis in AI-era codebases.
responsibilities: Specifies CLI entry points (spine, archspine) and binary executables
Sets Node.js engine compatibility to >=20 and module system to ESM
Controls packaging scope via files whitelist (excludes maps, mocks, source maps)
Declares runtime dependencies for core functionality (semantic parsing, AST analysis, MCP integration)
Declares devDependencies for build, test, lint, and documentation toolchains
Defines npm scripts for building, testing, validating, publishing, and daily operations
invariants: Node.js engine must be >=20 (lower versions will reject installation)
Module type must be 'module' (ESM) – all .js files are treated as ES modules
License must be Apache-2.0 – governs redistribution and attribution
Main entry must resolve to 'dist/cli/index.js' – all CLI logic starts here
Binaries must map to the same compiled entry point
Files shipped to npm must match the 'files' whitelist; maps and mocks are excluded

English.role: Configures the ArchSpine package as an executable Node.js CLI tool. It defines the binary names (spine, archspine), the entry point, required Node.js version, package type (ESM), dependency sets, and scripts for development and release. This configuration is critical for correct installation, execution, and packaging of the governance system.

parameter_definitions.name: Package identifier 'archspine' – used for publishing and dependency resolution.
parameter_definitions.version: Semantic version 1.0.2 – determines compatibility and release tracking.
parameter_definitions.description: Human-readable summary of the package's purpose as a governance and semantic layer.
parameter_definitions.main: Primary entry point 'dist/cli/index.js' – loaded when the package is required.
parameter_definitions.bin: Defines two CLI commands 'spine' and 'archspine' that execute the compiled index.
parameter_definitions.type: Set to 'module' – forces ES module semantics for all .js files in the package.
parameter_definitions.engines: Requires Node >= 20 – prevents installation on incompatible runtimes.
parameter_definitions.files: Whitelist of files to include in npm package; excludes internal mocks and source maps for security and size.
parameter_definitions.scripts: Maps common tasks (build, test, docs, lint, publish) to executable commands; used by CI and developers.
parameter_definitions.dependencies: Runtime packages required for the tool to function (e.g., AST parser, DB, MCP).
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: Tooling dependencies for development, testing, and documentation; not shipped to end users.
parameter_definitions.license: Apache-2.0 – governs usage, modification, and distribution rights.

English.stability_and_risks: Misconfiguration of the engines field could allow installation on unsupported Node versions, leading to runtime failures. Incorrect bin paths would make CLI commands unavailable. Omitting critical dependencies would break core functionality (e.g., AST analysis, SQLite storage). Overly permissive files whitelist could inadvertently ship internal mocks or maps, increasing package size and potential attack surface. The ESM module type requires all importing code to use ES module syntax, which may cause compatibility issues with CommonJS-only consumers. The version string must be managed carefully to avoid breaking releases. Script configurations that fail (e.g., missing build step) can halt CI pipelines.

Simplified Chinese.role: 将 ArchSpine 包配置为可执行的 Node.js CLI 工具。定义了二进制命令名称 (spine, archspine)、入口文件、所需的 Node.js 版本、包类型 (ESM)、依赖项集合以及开发和发布脚本。该配置对于治理系统的正确安装、执行和打包至关重要。

parameter_definitions.name: 包标识符 'archspine'，用于发布和依赖解析。
parameter_definitions.version: 语义版本 1.0.2，决定兼容性和发布跟踪。
parameter_definitions.description: 包用途的可读摘要，描述其为治理和语义层。
parameter_definitions.main: 主要入口点 'dist/cli/index.js'，当 require 本包时加载。
parameter_definitions.bin: 定义两个 CLI 命令 'spine' 和 'archspine'，执行编译后的入口文件。
parameter_definitions.type: 设置为 'module'，强制包内所有 .js 文件使用 ES 模块语义。
parameter_definitions.engines: 要求 Node >= 20，防止在不兼容的运行时上安装。
parameter_definitions.files: 包含在 npm 包中的文件白名单；排除内部模拟文件和源映射以确保安全性和减小体积。
parameter_definitions.scripts: 将常见任务（构建、测试、文档、检查、发布）映射到可执行命令，供 CI 和开发者使用。
parameter_definitions.dependencies: 工具运行时所需的依赖包（如 AST 解析器、数据库、MCP 集成）。
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: 用于开发、测试和文档的工具依赖，不随包发布给终端用户。
parameter_definitions.license: Apache-2.0 许可证，规定使用、修改和分发权。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: engines 字段配置错误可能导致在不支持的 Node 版本上安装，引发运行时故障。bin 路径错误会使 CLI 命令不可用。遗漏关键依赖会破坏核心功能（如 AST 分析、SQLite 存储）。files 白名单过于宽泛可能意外包含内部模拟文件或映射，增加包体积和攻击面。ESM 模块类型要求所有导入代码使用 ES 模块语法，可能与仅支持 CommonJS 的消费者发生兼容问题。版本号需谨慎管理以避免破坏性发布。脚本配置失败（如缺少构建步骤）可能导致 CI 流水线中断。
